instructions: Write your email using all the notes.

task.subject: Looking after my dog
task.initialEmail: Hi,||My family is going away for one night next weekend. [1]Could you look after my dog on Saturday?[/1]||[2]He needs a walk in the evening. Is that OK?[/2]||[3]What time should I bring him to your house?[/3]||[4]Would you like me to pay you?[/4]||Thanks||Nathan

sampleAnswer.text: Hi Nathan,||Thanks for asking me. [1]Yes, I can look after your dog on Saturday. I like him, and my parents said it is fine.[/1]||[2]I’m sorry, but I can’t walk him in the evening because I’m going to my cousin’s party. I can walk him in the afternoon instead.[/2]||[3]You should bring him to my house at about eleven o’clock, because I’ll be at home then.[/3]||[4]No, you don’t need to pay me because we are friends and it will be fun.[/4]||See you soon,||Ben
